hooks.command: { git rev-parse --git-dir >/dev/null 2>&1 && { TS=$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S); SHA=$(git stash create 2>/dev/null); git tag "backup-$TS" "${SHA:-HEAD}" 2>/dev/null; git tag -l 'backup-*' --sort=-creatordate | tail -n +21 | while read t; do [ -n "$t" ] && git tag -d "$t" >/dev/null 2>&1; done; }; } || true
